playbook.intent: Empty week → one newsletter issue scheduled in Substack or Beehiiv by Friday.
playbook.scope: One newsletter issue drafted by Friday: ideated, outlined, written, and scheduled in Substack or Beehiiv for the Sunday send, keeping the cadence unbroken.

success-criteria.criterion: Issue drafted, outlined, and queued for Sunday send
Subject line A/B variants prepared if platform supports
Backlog rotated — top idea replaced with a fresh one

stage.name: Ideate
stage.intent: Pick the issue topic with strongest reader signal.

tasks.task: Review last 7 days of reader replies and DMs
Cross-reference top tweets and audience asks
Pick the one topic with the most pull

stage.decision-gate: Advance once a single topic is picked with reader-signal proof.

stage.name: Outline

tasks.task: Open with a hook tied to recent audience signal

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when outline maps to one CTA, not two.

stage.name: Draft
stage.intent: Full draft written in one sitting.

tasks.task: Fill outline in a single 60-min focus block
Edit ruthlessly for length and skim-ability

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the draft survives a single re-read with no major rewrite.

stage.name: Schedule
stage.intent: Queued for Sunday with subject lines locked.

tasks.task: Schedule send for Sunday morning local

stage.decision-gate: Done when ESP shows the issue queued.

extra.value: [Multi-issue campaigns — single weekly issue, 'Newsletter platform migration — pick once, stick', Cross-platform repurposing — fanout is a separate playbook]
[Active newsletter on Substack or Beehiiv, A topic backlog with at least 5 candidate ideas]
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content weekly-newsletter-ideation-draft --format md, agent: faion get-content weekly-newsletter-ideation-draft --format context, json: faion get-content weekly-newsletter-ideation-draft --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
